reforms.description: Since mid-2010, 13 universities have received additional funding through tendering procedures to enhance research and development activities and foster collaboration between higher education institutions and the private sector.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing R&D activities in universities is expected to improve innovation and collaboration with the private sector, leading to increased productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The funding has been allocated and is currently in use by the universities.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly increases funding for R&D in universities, which is a notable change but not a complete overhaul of the system.
reforms.source_quote: Since mid-2010, 13 universities have benefited from additional funding through tendering procedures to support research and development activities.

reforms.description: Hungary developed a 'Paid Internship Employment' programme that combines tax incentives for employers with adult mentoring to help young graduates start their careers, primarily in the public sector.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The programme aims to improve the employability of young graduates, thereby enhancing the skilled workforce necessary for innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme is currently operational and providing support to young graduates.
reforms.importance_rationale: The programme introduces significant support for young graduates entering the workforce, which is an important but not transformative change.
reforms.source_quote: Hungary developed a programme of 'Paid Internship Employment', combining tax incentives for employers and adult mentoring.
